product_overview: Backend API for a bus scheduling and operations management system providing authentication, user management, bus/route/schedule data, day-off and emergency reporting, notifications, chat, and scheduling rules. APIs are RESTful endpoints secured with JWT authentication where required.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication and session management for system users
Expose read/write endpoints for managing buses, routes, and schedules used by operations staff
Support personnel workflows: day-off requests, emergency reporting, notifications, and chat
Enforce authorization on protected resources and return consistent error responses
Keep APIs simple, observable, and compatible with existing Node.js/Express/Prisma stack

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Allow users to authenticate to the system and receive a JWT token for authorized requests.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: User API
features.description: Retrieve user profiles and listings for administration and profile viewing.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/users with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of user profiles
GET /api/users without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Buses API
features.description: List and inspect bus models and their status for operations planning.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/buses with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of buses
GET /api/buses with expired/invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Routes API
features.description: Provide the list of bus routes used to build schedules and for driver assignment.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/routes with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of routes
GET /api/routes without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Schedules API
features.description: Fetch bus schedules for a given timeframe or route for display in planner tools and mobile clients.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/schedules with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of schedules
GET /api/schedules with malformed query or missing required params -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Day Off API
features.description: Expose day-off request records for managers to view and act upon.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/dayoff with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of day-off requests
GET /api/dayoff without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Emergency API
features.description: Provide emergency reports and related metadata for operations and safety teams.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/emergency with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of emergency reports
GET /api/emergency with insufficient permissions -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Notifications API
features.description: Retrieve user notifications for in-app display and push delivery.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/notifications with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of notifications
GET /api/notifications with invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Chat API
features.description: Access chat logs for conversations between staff and support or operational groups.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/chat with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of chat messages
GET /api/chat without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Rules API
features.description: Retrieve scheduling and operational rules used by the planner and validation routines.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /api/rules with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with array of rules
GET /api/rules with unauthorized role -> Receive 403 Forbidden
